name: Marutai Co.,Ltd.
summary: Marutai Co.,Ltd. produces and sells noodles, seasonings, and confectionery products in Japan. It offers instant, stick-like, cup, and fried noodles; and cupcakes, tildes, assortments, and other products. The company was formerly known as Marutai Taimeido Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Marutai Co.,Ltd. in 1990. Marutai Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Fukuoka, Japan.
